input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8867 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-actuator:3.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Spring Boot 3.0 removed or renamed several 2.6-era Actuator APIs, including HttpTrace in favor of HttpExchange-style APIs, and changed constructors such as HealthEndpoint, EnvironmentEndpoint, and Sanitizer.
Some Actuator integration health indicators depend on optional third-party clients; tests should avoid those optional integration packages unless they intentionally add the corresponding dependency.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is required for meaningful tests of spring-boot-actuator 3.0.0 core APIs; the javac failure is due to Spring Boot 3 API changes from 2.6.x.
